title: Crispy Pilaf Bites
description: Crispy on the outside and fluffy on the inside, these pilaf bites are perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, mix together pilaf and melted shortening until well combined.
3. Add tangy (soy sauce) to the pilaf mixture and stir until evenly distributed.
4. Use your hands to shape the mixture into small balls, about 1-inch in diameter.
5. Place the pilaf balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
